goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the east. Make sure you get attraction type. You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the same area as the attraction and should include free parking. The hotel should be in the type of hotel. Make sure you get whether they have internet, address, and phone number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the hotel by 22:45. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I am looking for some places to go in the east. I'd like an entertainment attraction. Can you give me some suggestions and phone numbers please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Cherry Hinton Hall's number is 01223446104. The phone number for Funky Fun House is 01223304705.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What other types of attractions are available in the east?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are swimming pools, parks, museums and multiple sport attractions as well.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What type of attraction is Cherry Hinton Hall?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: It is an entertainment place, does that satiate your desires?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: That sounds great.  I also need a hotel in the same area as the attraction

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Do you have an accommodation type or price range?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I need a hotel with free parking.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There is no hotel in the east with free parking

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: okay can you look for a hotel without free parking?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I didn't mention that there are guesthouses in the east with free parking. Did you specifically need a hotel type or would a guesthouse be okay?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I will take anything with free parking.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I recommend the Allenbell guesthouse. Would you like to book a room there?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can you let me know if they have internet, their address, and phone number?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes Allenbell has internet and the phone number is 01223210353 address is 517a coldham lane.	Would you like for me to reserve you a room?

goal.description: You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions. You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should be in the moderate price range. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the type of hotel. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 2 people and 5 nights starting from wednesday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called byard art. Make sure you get entrance fee. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the hotel by 24:45. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, I'm looking for a place to stay.  My family can't wait to visit some of the local attractions there.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I can help with that. Do you have a preference ?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: They really dislike the small size of most guesthouses, so why don't we look for hotels instead.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Where does your budget lie, between expensive and cheap?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Moderate pricing and book it for 2 people for 5 nights starting on Weds and i need ref number

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have a place called the Lovell Lodge. I was able to book you successfully. Reference number is : MKVVDABX. Is there anything else I can help you with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: yes, i'm looking for information on an attraction called byard art

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Byard Art is a fantastic free museum on the south side of town. It's located at 14 King's Parade, cb21sj.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What's the fee for that?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: It is actually free.  What else can I tell you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would like a taxi between the hotel and the museum.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Can you tell me what time you would like the taxi to leave after or arrive by?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I want to leave the hotel by 24:45, so it will be from Lovell Lodge to Byard Art

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have your taxi reservation made.  What else can I do for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can I get the contact number and car type?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Of course! The car type is yellow Toyota. The contact number is 07952079804. Can I help you with anything else today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I think that'll be all. Thank you for your help.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: you're welcome. thank you for using the system. have a good day.

goal.description: You are looking for information in Cambridge. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of nightclub. Make sure you get area, phone number, and entrance fee. You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and doesn't need to include internet. The hotel should be in the type of hotel. If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 2 people and 4 nights starting from thursday. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the attraction by 22:45. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I am looking for nightclub options in cambridge.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure, we have 6 ballare, club salsa, kambar, soul tree nightclub, and the fez club.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What is the area and how much is the entrance fee? I will need the address and the phone number.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The ballare is located in the centre and costs 5 pounds. They are located at heidelberg gardens, lion yard.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Great!  I also need a place to stay in the moderate price range.  Any suggestions?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: the a and b guest house is a guesthouse located in the east. It has 4 stars and is moderately priced.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I was really hoping to find a hotel if you could?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: No problem.  I have three hotels, however, they are not 4 star.  How about a 2 star rated hotel?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: A 2 star hotel is fine does it have free wifi?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Lovell Lodge is a hotel in the north that has free internet.  Would you like me to book it?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, please.  I'd like 4 nights for 2 people starting Thursday.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Okay, we have booked you two for 4 nights, and your reference number is ZUA8CK80. Anything else I can help with today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, please! I need a taxi to commute between the two places.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Okay, not a problem. Which place will you like to be picked up from, and at what time?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I want to leave the Ballare by 22:45. Can you get me the contact number and car type?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: A yellow Toyota will pick you up. There number is 07113435261, just in case you need it.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you very much for helping me! Have a great day.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You're welcome. If you need anything else don't hesitate to call.

goal.description: You are looking for information in Cambridge. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum and should be in the east. Make sure you get postcode. You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 3 and should be in the type of guesthouse. The hotel should be in the south and should be in the moderate price range. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 3 nights starting from wednesday. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the hotel by 16:45. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The postcode for Cambridge Artworks is cb13ef. Can I help you with anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'm in need of a guesthouse. I'd like it to have three stars.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are 4 guesthouses available, two in the north, one each in the south and west.  Do you have a preference on area?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, I'd prefer a moderate place in the south.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Bridge guest house is a guesthouse in the south in the moderate price range. It also has parking and internet. Would you like to book a room?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: yes please for 7 people and for 3 nights starting Wednesday

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Congratulations! Your hotel was booked with the reference number 89RKAN7M. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

turns.speaker: user

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Thank you for allowing me to assist you today.  Please enjoy your stay and let us know if there's anything we can help you with in the future!

goal.description: You are looking for information in Cambridge. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of entertainment. If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of boat. Make sure you get address and entrance fee. You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should be in the moderate price range. The hotel should have a star of 3. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 2 people and 2 nights starting from saturday. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places.
